paths.src/config-server/index.ts: framework infrastructure: reads its own package.json at runtime to recover server version metadata
paths.src/config-server/package-root.ts: framework infrastructure: locates the package root by walking up to the nearest @claudeagents/config-server package.json
paths.src/config-server/resolution/detection.t: framework infrastructure: skips standard build artifact directories (node_modules, dist, build) during marker-file detection
paths.src/config-server/resolution/resolved-co: framework infrastructure: documentation comment about runtime package.json read
paths.src/config-server/resolution/stack-resol: framework infrastructure: documentation comment about packageRoot helper that walks to a package.json
paths.src/config-server/tools/reads.ts: framework infrastructure: reads its own package.json at runtime
paths.src/config-server/tools/validate.ts: framework infrastructure: documentation comment about packageRoot helper that walks to a package.json
